title: Julian, KTH Scholarship
eligibility: "Thanks to the scholarship, I’ve been able to dedicate myself to both academics and extracurricular projects without financial stress. It’s opened doors to research opportunities, meaningful student activities, and connections within the international KTH community."

title: Stockholm Trio Scholarship
eligibility: If you are a fee-paying student admitted to a joint master's programme within the university alliance Stockholm Trio, you can apply for the Stockholm Trio Scholarship. The scholarship covers the full tuition fee.
documents: See scholarship page for required documents.
instructions: Apply via Stockholm University scholarship application.
application_instructions: Apply via Stockholm University scholarship application.

title: Read more about the scholarship, application process, past projects and scholarship holders here!

title: Read more about the Minor Field Studies Scholarship here
eligibility: Minor Field Studies (MFS) is a scholarship program for field studies in developing countries. It is intended for students who are reaching the end of their BSc or MSc degree and who wish to gather material for their degree essay on-site in a developing country.
